name: Tea Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat together the butter and powdered sugar until smooth and creamy.
2. Add vanilla extract.
3. Blend together flour, salt, and a dash of baking powder.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture to the butter mixture, blending well.
5. Stir in the chopped pecans and combine thoroughly.
6. Roll the dough into two balls and wrap in plastic wrap. Chill for at least 1 hour.
7. Flatten each dough ball on a floured surface.
8. Cut into 15-16 equal pieces using a sharp knife or cookie cutter.
9. Shape each piece into marble-sized balls.
10. Place the cookies on ungreased baking sheets, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
11. Bake at 375°F (190°C) to 400°F (200°C) for 10-12 minutes per batch until firm but not brown.
12. Remove from oven and let cool slightly on the baking sheet.
13. Dust with powdered sugar while still warm, then roll each cookie in additional powdered sugar before cooling completely.
These cookies store well and are very delicious!
